LightningComponentBundle.description: Quick-access account cards (Orders, Invoices, Quotes, Support). Guests are routed to login; logged-in users go to the respective site pages.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.default: One login for your entire Capsa relationship

property.name: ordersPage
property.label: Orders Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for logged-in users.

property.name: invoicesPage
property.label: Invoices Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for logged-in users.

property.name: quotesPage
property.label: Quotes Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for logged-in users.

property.name: supportPage
property.label: Support Cases Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name for logged-in users.
